sentences.text: Thank you for calling leave group the best and real estate Solutions. Please listen closely. As our menu options have changed. Please note this mailbox is not monitored for emergency request. If you would like to repeat this menu please press zero. Thank you for calling the Leaf Group. Star Star is not a valid extension please try again. Thank you for calling the lease group the best and real estate Solutions. Please listen closely. As our menu options have changed.
